description.overview: A sleek, athletic terrier bred for ratting and rabbit coursing. Manchesters are devoted, spirited companions with low grooming needs.
description.history: The Manchester Terrier originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being spirited, alert, keen.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, smooth, glossy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A sleek, athletic terrier bred for ratting and rabbit coursing. Manchesters are devoted, spirited companions with low grooming needs.
